title: Vram
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Human/Legends|Human]] boy|[[Vram (Pyke)|the Pyke]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Vram |homeworld=[[Hethrir]]'s [[Worldcraft]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Empire Reborn]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You're wrong! You're wrong! You have to go to bed without your dinner. And it goes on your record!–''"
"''–You're nasty! How did you get so nasty?|Vram and Jaina|''[[The Crystal Star]]''}} '''Vram''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] boy associated with the [[Empire Reborn]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. ==Biography== As with most of the other children kept on [[Hethrir]]'s [[Worldcraft]], Vram may have been from one of the sleeper-ships that contained people from planets that had been condemned and punished by Hethrir during his days as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Procurator of Justice]]. Like most of the children under Hethrir, he was indoctrinated into believing that [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had brought security and prosperity into the galaxy through his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was a threat to that galactic security. Vram was a hardened bully and was also [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] with this being evident by him harassing the [[Chironian]] [[Lusa]]. Before the death of Lord [[Hethrir]] he achieved the rank of [[Helpers|Helper]], allowing him to don the rust-red tunic worn as a uniform. Despite this, Hethrir still did not trust him and kept him locked up at night in a cell. On one occasion, he mistreated a then-five year old [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] during her incarceration at Hethrir's [[Worldcraft]]. While Jaina insisted that her mother [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was the greatest leader in galactic history, Vram angrily told her that [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was the greatest. When the children that Hethrir captured escaped, Jaina and her brother [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] offered to let Vram out of his cell, having escaped and immobilized the [[Head Proctor]]. Vram angrily rejected the offer, believing that Jaina would hit him. The twins then slammed the door of his cell, shutting him in. His fate after that is unknown though he may have been captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vram |pl=Vram }} [[Category:Dark side adepts]] [[Category:Empire Reborn members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
